title: ochna globosa
intro: Ochna globosa, also known as the cancer bush or Mickey mouse plant, is a small, deciduous tree native to southern Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. Its health benefits include reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and alleviating digestive problems, while also possessing anti-cancer properties. Ochna globosa can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional herbal remedies to treat a range of ailments.
